label: The Filigree Store
description: The Filigree Store serves as Suturesill House’s principal storage chamber, a narrow vertical room sheathed in laminar mirror-slag that multiplies its volume into strict, axial reflections. Basalt-glass shelving is set into seam-grooved recesses, and each shelf edge carries an electrostatically pinned lace of Lacrymara’s charged dust, preserved as deliberate ornament. The floor is a dark vitrified grid scored with measured sightlines that align with the house’s internal geometry toward Seamline Concord’s auroral bearings. Vent baffles and gasketed lockers maintain the room’s still, dry atmosphere, keeping stored provisions and instruments free of drifted grit.
